hypotheses.name: cycle4_immune edge-level AUROC (735 pairs, SV5-7/SV2-4, all layers)
hypotheses.method: At each of 12 layers: SVD of centered nonzero embeddings [2039,512], project to SV5-7 and SV2-4. For each TRRUST edge pair compute cosine similarity between projected embeddings. AUROC for 589 valid edges. Permutation null (N=200, gene-position shuffle). Cross-seed replication at L2, L3.
hypotheses.result_value: Peak AUROC=0.602 at L0, L1=0.601; monotonic decline to L9-L11 (~0.49-0.50). L0-L8 all significant (perm_p≤0.045). L9-L11 not significant (perm_p>0.5). L3 cross-seed: main=0.574, seed43=0.574, seed44=0.566.
hypotheses.next_action: Test L0-L8 significance with Bonferroni correction. Compare edge AUROC to class-AUROC (prior iterations) using same data. Investigate why SV2-4 shows sub-null AUROC (possible edge repulsion).

hypotheses.name: AUROC mechanism diagnostic: sparsity vs depth as confound
hypotheses.method: Per-layer permutation null (N=200) + Spearman correlation of AUROC with layer index and per-layer nonzero gene count. Nonzero count extracted per-layer from embeddings.
hypotheses.result_value: Spearman(AUROC, layer)=-0.958, p=9.5e-7. nz_count constant at 2039 for all 12 layers (NaN correlation). Sparsity is NOT a confound. AUROC decline with depth is genuine geometric structure loss.
hypotheses.next_action: Sparsity confound eliminated. Claim AUROC trend as genuine. Test other potential confounds: embedding norm per layer, effective rank per layer.

hypotheses.name: Cross-cycle Procrustes alignment transfer (cycle1 to cycle4)
hypotheses.method: Find 80 shared genes between cycle1 and cycle4 edge sets. Fit Procrustes rotation (cycle4 SV5-7 -> cycle1 SV5-7). Compute edge-level cosine-similarity AUROC before and after alignment.
hypotheses.result_value: c4_aligned = c4_raw for all layers (rotation-invariant metric). Design flaw: cosine similarity AUROC is invariant to orthogonal transformation. c1_own AUROC=0.54-0.56; c4_raw AUROC=0.50-0.60. Only 80 shared genes between cycles.
hypotheses.next_action: Redesign C1: use LR classifier (trained on cycle1 in SV5-7) applied to Procrustes-aligned cycle4 gene embeddings. Metric must not be rotation-invariant. Requires class labels (TF/target) in cycle1 space.
